news.headline: Federal Reserve Chair Powell fell victim to a prank call by Russian imposters - new reports state.
Schneider Electric named Top International Corporate Citizen in Canada by Corporate Knights.
news.summary: Schneider Electric, based in Mississauga, Ontario, has been honored as one of the leading International Corporate Citizens in Canada by Corporate Knights. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to corporate social responsibility. Schneider Electric's dedication to sustainability and community impact has positioned them among the top companies in the country. This accolade underscores their efforts to make a positive difference, showcasing their standing as a responsible corporate entity.

news.headline: Ethereum devs explore Pectra upgrade, client variety, and block validation at Consensus Call #136 led by Alex Stokes.
news.summary: In the latest All Core Developers Consensus Call #136, led by Alex Stokes, Ethereum developers discussed key updates including the Pectra upgrade, client diversity, and block validation. The meeting centered around important aspects crucial for Ethereum's functioning. The developers highlighted the significance of these upgrades and processes in improving the overall efficiency and security of the Ethereum network. This call, attended by a significant number of developers, marked a step forward in the continued evolution of Ethereum, showcasing the community's commitment to driving advancements in blockchain technology.

news.headline: Supreme Court's recent decision eliminates Chevron Doctrine, jeopardizing federal rules on health care, safety, and environment.
news.summary: In 1984, a pivotal decision was made that mandated courts to uphold agencies' rational interpretations of unclear laws. This ruling has since served as the basis for numerous regulations concerning healthcare, safety, and environmental protection.

news.headline: Hybrid Memory Cube market to reach $18.65 billion by 2030 with CAGR of 18.6%. Segmented by types and applications.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of June 28, 2024, the Hybrid Memory Cube market is experiencing segmentation based on type, including Central Processing Unit, Field-Programmable Gate Array, Graphics Processing Unit, Application-Specific Integrated Circuit, and Accelerated Processing Unit. This market is also segmented by application, particularly in Enterprise Storage. The market analysis involves a detailed breakdown of categories and uses, reflecting the growing importance of advanced memory solutions in the digital landscape.

news.headline: Mammha secures funding from American Heart Association to boost perinatal mental health innovations.
news.summary: A company based in Miami, Mammha, specializing in perinatal mental health care, recently secured funding from the American Heart Association Social Impact Funds. The funding was granted on June 5, 2024, and will allow Mammha to broaden its reach and services.

news.headline: Global veterinary ultrasound market expected to reach USD 539 million by 2029 from USD 385 million in 2024, growing at a 7.0% CAGR.
news.summary: As of June 28, 2024, the worldwide veterinary ultrasound market is expected to experience significant expansion, with a projected value of USD 539 million by 2029 compared to USD 385 million in 2024, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.0% throughout the period from 2024 to 2029. Factors fueling this growth include increasing interest in specialized ultrasound services...

news.headline: Cook & Boardman acquires 4 companies, expanding nationwide total opening solutions; PRNewswire - June 28, 2024.
news.summary: A company based in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, known as The Cook & Boardman Group LLC, is expanding its total opening solutions nationwide. The organization, a top distributor of commercial entry solutions and systems integration services, recently disclosed this information. The initiative aims to enhance operations on a larger scale.

news.headline: Global Service Robotics Market to surpass USD 134.64 billion by 2031 from USD 26.42 billion in 2022, growing at 16.60% CAGR.
news.summary: In Westford, Massachusetts, a recent report from SkyQuest revealed significant growth in the global Service Robotics Market. Starting at USD 26.42 billion in 2022, the market increased to USD 30.69 billion in 2023. It is projected to reach USD 134.64 billion by 2031, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.60% expected during the forecast period.

news.headline: Ohio awards Hall of Fame Village Project $9.8 million. Resort & Entertainment Company centered on professional football.
news.summary: The Hall of Fame Resort & Entertainment Company, trading under NASDAQ symbols HOFV and HOFVW, based in Canton, Ohio, disclosed on June 28, 2024, that their Hall of Fame Village project has been granted a significant award. This company is distinct as it is the sole resort, entertainment, and media entity with a focus on the influence of professional football.

news.headline: Bavarian Nordic enhances efforts to combat Africa's mpox outbreak with MVA-BN vaccine approved in 2022-2023, soon in DRC.
news.summary: In Copenhagen today, Bavarian Nordic A/S (OMX: BAVA) revealed its continued dedication to combat the ongoing mpox epidemic in Africa. Their MVA-BN vaccine, the sole FDA and EMA-endorsed mpox vaccine, played a vital role in managing the mpox crisis from 2022-2023. Plans are underway to make this vaccine accessible in the DR Congo (DRC) and various other African nations as well, potentially assisting in saving more lives.

news.headline: Global Fintech Blockchain Market to surge to USD 57.84 billion by 2031, growing at 43.8% CAGR from USD 2.2 billion in 2022.
news.summary: In Westford, Massachusetts, latest reports reveal that the global Fintech Blockchain Market had a worth of USD 2.2 billion in 2022. The market is projected to increase from USD 3.16 billion in 2023 to a substantial USD 57.84 billion by 2031, indicating a noteworthy Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 43.8% during the forecast period.

news.headline: Biden's re-election odds dip as Newsom sees a rise in popularity in betting markets.
APAC data center market valued at USD 83.86 Billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 150.59 Billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 10.25%.
news.summary: A recent report on the APAC Data Center Market has been released, showing that the market was worth USD 83.86 Billion in 2023 and is anticipated to grow to USD 150.59 Billion by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate of 10.25%. The region's data center market is home to various prominent IT infrastructure providers, including Hewlett Packard Enterprise, IBM, Atos, Cisco Systems, Dell Technologies, Arista Networks, and Juniper Networks. This information comes from an analysis available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

Market sentiment at a neutral 48/100 on Fear and Greed Index.
Global Automotive IoT Market to reach USD 635.48 billion by 2031, growing from USD 102.3 billion in 2022 at a CAGR of 22.5%.
news.summary: In June 28, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide Automotive IoT Market had reached a value of USD 102.3 billion in 2022. The market was projected to increase from USD 125.32 billion in 2023 to USD 635.48 billion by 2031, demonstrating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.5% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Software Asset Management Market to reach $7.3 billion by 2029, with a 16.0% CAGR growth from $3.5 billion in 2024 (Source: MarketsandMarkets™)
news.summary: In Chicago on June 28, 2024, it was reported that the Software Asset Management Market is projected to double in value from USD 3.5 billion in 2024 to USD 7.3 billion by 2029. This growth represents a 16.0% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) anticipated during the forecast period. The information comes from a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™, highlighting the significant potential for expansion in the software industry.

news.headline: Vivos Inc. files application with FDA for IDE to begin human clinical trials.
news.summary: In Richland, Washington on June 28, 2024, it was announced that Vivos Inc. (trading on OTCQB as RDGL) has submitted an application for an Investigational Device Exemption (IDE).

news.headline: WTW releases second sustainability report highlighting programs and successes in promoting sustainability.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, a prominent advisory and broking firm, WTW, released its second yearly sustainability report titled "Taking Action to Create Sustainable Value." The report details the company's sustainability initiatives, promises, and achievements.

news.headline: Century Communities announces new communities & model homes in San Antonio, including groundbreaking events.
news.summary: In San Antonio, a series of groundbreaking events were held in the community. Furthermore, new model homes have been unveiled in Seguin and San Antonio by Century Communities, Inc., a prominent homebuilder listed on the NYSE under the symbol CCS. This company is well-known for their top position in online home sales and holds a significant place in the industry. The events took place on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Ademi LLP is looking into Infinera's potential violations regarding its transaction with Nokia - June 28, 2024.
news.summary: An investigation is being conducted by Ademi LLP in Milwaukee as of June 28, 2024, regarding Infinera (NASDAQ: INFN) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty and legal violations in its agreement with Nokia. For more information on how to participate in the case, individuals can visit the website https://www.ademilaw.com/case/infinera-corporation or contact the firm via phone at [insert phone number].

news.headline: Metronet to bring $2.3 million ultrafast fiber internet to Belle Plaine, offering up to 5-gigabit speeds to residents, 10-gigabit to businesses.
news.summary: In Evansville, Indiana, Metronet has revealed plans for Belle Plaine that will provide residents and businesses with access to their high-speed fiber internet service. The expansion project, with an investment totaling $2.3 million, will integrate Belle Plaine into Metronet’s growing all-fiber network across Minnesota. This initiative will grant residents the capability to access speeds of up to five gigabits symmetrical, while businesses can enjoy speeds of up to ten gigabits. Construction for the project is slated to commence shortly.

news.headline: AutoFull M6 gaming chair prioritizes comfort and support for gamers to alleviate poor posture and discomfort. A game-changer!
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, AutoFull introduced its latest gaming chair, the AutoFull M6, aiming to address the needs of gamers globally. Recognizing the widespread issue of poor posture and discomfort among gamers who spend extended periods gaming or working, AutoFull stands out in the competitive gaming chair market by prioritizing comfort and support. The AutoFull M6 promises to provide an unmatched level of ergonomic design to alleviate these common issues, catering to the needs of gamers looking for a solution.

news.headline: "Fort Worth's 17th annual Fourth celebration to feature fireworks on Trinity River sponsored by U.S. LawShield."
news.summary: The annual Fort Worth's Fourth celebration, known as one of the biggest Independence Day events in North Texas, is set to take place at Panther Island Pavilion in Fort Worth on July 4, 2024. The event, now in its 17th year, will run from 5 p.m. to 10 p.m. and promises a variety of festivities for attendees.

news.headline: Clinica Imbanaco receives 2024 Health Technology Excellence Award from ECRI, nonprofit in healthcare and patient safety.
news.summary: In Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania on June 28, 2024, ECRI, a worldwide independent nonprofit organization focusing on healthcare and patient safety, has announced Clinica Imbanaco as the recipient of the 2024 Health Technology Excellence Award. This prestigious annual award is granted to a member facility demonstrating outstanding performance in adopting innovative healthcare technologies.

news.headline: ZeroEyes, AI gun detection firm, raises $53M+ in Series B led by Sorenson Capital for growth, to tackle gun violence.
news.summary: Sorenson Capital takes the lead in an oversubscribed funding round that backs ZeroEyes' goal to eradicate gun-related violence. The company, based in Philadelphia, unveiled their AI-driven gun detection video analytics platform, recognized by the US Department of Homeland Security SAFETY Act. The announcement was made on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Baseball legend Hank Aaron to be honored with a new Forever stamp by U.S. Postal Service. Stamp unveiling event open to public. #HankAaronStamp
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, the U.S. Postal Service announced the upcoming release of a commemorative Forever stamp in honor of baseball legend Henry "Hank" Aaron. The first-day-of-issue event for the stamp will be free for the public to attend. This news is being spread with the hashtag #HankAaronStamp. This initiative aims to celebrate Aaron's legacy and contributions to the sport.

news.headline: 70mai launches A510, next-gen Dash Cam Pro Plus+, known for exceptional performance and tech features.
news.summary: In Shanghai on June 28, 2024, 70mai, a top auto intelligence company, revealed the release of the A510, the latest version of the praised Dash Cam Pro Plus+. Boasting outstanding performance and advanced technology, the A510 continues the legacy of its predecessor in providing top-notch features.

news.headline: TruDiagnostic launches first organ-specific aging analysis using SYMPHONYAge algorithms developed by Yale.
news.summary: A significant advancement in epigenetic research and clinical health applications is being achieved by TruDiagnostic, a laboratory based in Lexington, Kentucky. They are introducing the inaugural epigenetic aging analysis of individual organ systems, which marks a milestone in this field. The analysis is conducted using validated and system-specific trained techniques, showing promise for personalized health assessments. This development is set to revolutionize how we understand aging and its impacts on our organ systems. Stay tuned for updates on this ground-breaking initiative.

news.headline: Solidia Technologies licenses low carbon cement technology to CalPortland Company, a pioneer in the market.
news.summary: In a recent development on June 28, 2024, Solidia Technologies, Inc. has announced a technology licensing agreement with CalPortland Company. Solidia Technologies, known for its innovations in the low carbon cement and concrete sector, is a key player in the industry. This partnership signifies a significant move towards sustainable construction practices. The agreement is poised to impact the industry with advanced technology. Details of the licensing arrangement, including specific numbers and terms, have not been disclosed as of yet.

news.headline: NRMP® releases 2024 Main Residency Match Results, vital for medical education stakeholders.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, the National Resident Matching Program (NRMP) released its yearly Main Residency Match Results and Data report for participants in the Main Residency Match, including educators, stakeholders, and policymakers in graduate medical education. The report provides key insights and statistics for the 2024 Main Residency Match, offering valuable information to the medical community.

news.headline: Painting Robot Market to hit $5.8B by 2029, growing at CAGR of 13.1% from 2024 to 2029, per MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: A report predicts that the Painting Robot market is set to expand significantly in the coming years. With a current value of USD 3.1 billion in 2024, it is anticipated to skyrocket to USD 5.8 billion by 2029. This growth signifies a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 13.1% during the forecast period.

news.headline: Six Flags introduces metaverse on Roblox, offering virtual roller coasters, mazes; world's largest regional theme park company innovates industry.
news.summary: A major regional theme park and water park company, Six Flags Entertainment Corporation (NYSE: SIX), is revolutionizing virtual entertainment with the launch of its anticipated metaverse experience on Roblox. Known as the Six Flags Metaverse on Roblox, this immersive platform features various interactive experiences like virtual roller coasters and mazes. Six Flags is the largest operator of water parks in North America and the world’s biggest regional theme park company. The metaverse offering on Roblox is set to redefine the virtual entertainment landscape with its diverse range of attractions.

news.headline: Barts Bar Beverages Bloody Mary Mix from West Texas ranked #1 globally at the 2024 SIP Awards, earning the Platinum Medal.
news.summary: In MIDLAND, Texas, Barts Bar Beverages recently celebrated a significant achievement as their Premium Bloody Mary Mix secured the prestigious Platinum Medal at the 2024 SIP Awards International Spirits Competition, competing in the Bloody Mary Mixer Category. The SIP Awards highlighted that the Platinum Medal signifies the product's exceptional quality, with the Best of Class award being the highest honor bestowed upon premium spirits that achieve top scores in their categories. This recognition reflects the high praise received from consumer judges, solidifying Barts Bar Beverages' status as a top contender in the industry.

news.headline: Rio Tinto to use carbon-free aluminum smelting cells in Quebec, Canada with ELYSIS tech license. Plans for a demo plant with ten pots operating at 100kA.
news.summary: Rio Tinto recently announced plans to implement carbon-free aluminium smelting cells at its Arvida smelter in Québec, Canada. This initiative is made possible through obtaining the initial technology license from the ELYSIS joint venture. By investing in this project, Rio Tinto aims to advance the innovative ELYSISTM technology and enhance its capabilities in installation and management. The company is set to construct a showcase facility featuring ten pots operating at 100 kiloamperes (kA). This development signifies Rio Tinto's commitment to sustainable practices in aluminium production.

news.headline: Alcoa and Rio Tinto partner on ELYSIS technology, eliminating GHG emissions in smelting with plans for industrial-scale demo.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, Alcoa Corporation (NYSE: AA) has made an announcement regarding advancements in ELYSIS technology. Rio Tinto is set to launch the first industrial-scale demonstration of this innovative technology, developed through a partnership between Alcoa and Rio Tinto in 2018. ELYSIS eliminates all greenhouse gas emissions from the traditional smelting process and generates oxygen as a byproduct. This groundbreaking technology originated from the Alcoa Technical Center and marks a significant step forward in sustainable industrial practices.

news.headline: Global LoRa and LoRaWAN IoT market is projected to grow from $8.0 billion in 2024 to $32.7 billion by 2029, driven by tech giants like Bosch and Cisco, at a CAGR of 32.4%. Regulatory freedom fosters rapid deployment worldwide. LoRaWAN hardware plays a pivotal role in driving IoT solutions, with sensors leading the market segment.
news.summary: The global LoRa and LoRaWAN IoT Market is expected to grow from USD 8.0 billion in 2024 to USD 32.7 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 32.4%. The market report by MarketsandMarkets™ includes 320 tables, 58 figures, and spans 294 pages. Key drivers for market growth include the demand for low-power, long-range network connectivity, IoT technology advancements, and cost efficiency. However, data security concerns, high deployment costs, and interoperability issues act as restraints. Opportunities exist in smart city initiatives and integration with 5G. Notable players in the market include Bosch, Cisco, Orange SA, Comcast, and Semtech. LoRaWAN's use of unlicensed spectrum bands facilitates global deployment without regulatory hurdles, promoting innovation and competition in the IoT market. Hardware segment, comprising sensors and networking gateways, is anticipated to have the largest market size. LoRaWAN's versatility in smart cities and industrial automation drive its growth and adoption in diverse IoT applications.

news.headline: AGM notice and annual report released, important for shareholders.

Bloody Disgusting merchandise in Horror Fan Shops at select Walmart locations, including Terrifier 2's Art the Clown Collector's Edition VHS. LOS ANGELES, June 28, 2024. Cineverse and Bloody Disgusting collaboration.
news.summary: A special collector's edition VHS featuring Art the Clown from Terrifier 2 will be included in a collection of items from Cineverse's horror brand. The announcement was made on June 28, 2024, by Cineverse, a company specializing in streaming technology and entertainment, along with its horror division Bloody Disgusting. This limited edition VHS is part of the horror-themed merchandise lineup being offered by the company.

news.headline: Gurminder Bedi steps down from Blue Bird Corp board after nine-year tenure. (Nasdaq: BLBD)
news.summary: Blue Bird Corporation, a prominent provider of electric and low-emission school buses, shared news about Gurminder Bedi resigning from its board of directors, effective June 26, 2024, after serving for nine years. Bedi, who had joined as an independent director in 2015, had a reputable 30-year career at Ford Motor Company, notably as the vice president of the North American Truck business overseeing vehicle development and business operations. The company announced his departure without specifying the reason.

news.headline: University of Michigan reports final actual inflation for the past year at 3.0%, lower than the forecast of 3.2% and previous 3.3%.
Michigan University survey shows final sentiment at 68.2, beating forecast of 66 and previous 65.6.
Assange's Bitcoin donation reveals power of crypto in promoting transparency, aiding his safe return with community support.
news.summary: Members of the Bitcoin community rallied together to support Julian Assange, facilitating his safe repatriation to Australia without any outstanding debts.

news.headline: US IT Staffing market valued at $37.89 billion in 2023, projected to reach $52.21 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 5.49%. Leading companies include ASGN, Experis, Insight Global, Kforce, Randstad, and TEKsystems.
news.summary: A report on the U.S. IT Staffing Market has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. Valued at USD 37.89 Billion in 2023, the market is projected to reach USD 52.21 Billion by 2029, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.49%. IT staffing stands out as one of the most fragmented markets within various staffing sectors in the U.S. Due to relatively low entry barriers in the industry, vendors are urged to explore innovative strategies to stay competitive.

news.headline: Michigan university reports actual 5-year inflation at 3%, matching forecast and previous estimate of 3.1%.
University Michigan final consumer sentiment exceeded expectations at 69.6, above forecast of 68 and previous 67.6.
University of Michigan's final consumer sentiment index for the month came in at 65.9, surpassing both forecasted and previous numbers.
Fed's preferred inflation gauge, PCE, fell to 2.6% in May, lowest since March 2021, easing rate worries.
news.summary: Correction: In May, the core PCE inflation rate was recorded as the lowest since March 2021 on a year-over-year basis. The Federal Reserve's preferred measure, Personal Consumption Expenditure, declined in May as predicted by economists, solidifying expectations of future Fed rate cuts. Personal income saw a higher-than-expected increase in May, while personal spending experienced lower growth than anticipated on a month-over-month basis, suggesting a potential slowdown in consumer demand. The PCE price index decreased from 2.7% year-over-year in April to 2.6% in May according to the Bureau of Economic Analysis.

news.headline: DRIS is boosting equity by issuing new shares worth $10 million to expand operations and increase market presence.
